scenes.voice: Hey kids, today we're going on a fun adventure to learn about what makes us strong and healthy! Charlie here and I'm excited to share some cool facts with you!
Did you know that there are five main food groups? Fruits, vegetables, grains, proteins, and dairy. These groups help keep our bodies working properly!
A balanced diet means eating a little bit of everything from each food group. This helps us have lots of energy to run, play and smile!
Exercise and playtime are super important for our bodies. They help us stay strong, flexible and happy!
Remember to wash your hands often and keep yourself clean. This helps prevent germs and keep you healthy!
What is a balanced diet? A) Eating only fruits, B) Eating a little bit of everything, C) Eating only sweets. Choose your answer.
Hey kids, you've learned some super cool stuff today! Remember, a balanced diet, regular exercise and good hygiene are three keys to staying healthy and strong. Keep being your awesome selves!
